items.title: JPMorgan (JPM) Valuation Check as Investors Position for Earnings, Rate Tailwinds and AI-Driven Growth Potential
items.description: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) is back in the spotlight as investors look ahead to its January 13 earnings, supported by a constructive backdrop of wider rate spreads, healthier capital markets, and accelerating AI driven investment. See our latest analysis for JPMorgan Chase. Against that backdrop, JPMorgan’s share price has climbed to about $325.48, and while the 1 month share price return of 3.31% looks modest, the 1 year total shareholder return of 36.62% and 5 year total shareholder return of...

items.title: CNBC Daily Open: A banner year for markets in 2025
items.description: The S&P 500 rallied 16.39% in 2025, mostly on the back of enthusiasm over AI, though some pockets of the sector weakened as the year drew to a close.

items.title: 3 stocks to watch in 2026
